SEO SWIPE FILE
We’ve pulled a variety of content that Grant and his team have used to generate
organic search engine results. Utilize his examples and lessons learned to help shortcut
your SEO success!
Search Example #1 	Blog Entry on Main Site
Content Details: Classic example of a piece of onpage content with a strong
keyword phrase. This is intentionally very long to give search engine spiders lots to
crawl. It also includes a lot of YouTube videos, which Google loves. Also notice that
there are many variations of the keyword, as well as emphasis on the text such as
underlining.
Overall Value: This particular blog entry appears organically on Google hundreds of
thousands of times every year, generating thousands of free clicks. As you’ll notice, it
links to Grant’s Millionaire Booklet and 10X Rule, leading to many sales and leads.
Lesson Learned: Sometimes it is best to keep it simple, making your keyword
phrase your title and primary content theme. Also, recognize that instead of using the
same phrase too many times in the blog (“keyword stuffing”) that it is varied to keep it
natural.
Page URL: 10xresource.com/seoswipe1

Search Example #2 	Career Page on Main Site
Content Details: This is a page that promotes working at Grant’s companies.
During Covid, this page got almost 2 million search impressions in one year. This
is because Grant really promoted that he doesn’t require vaccination to work at
10X, which created lots of backlinks.
Overall Value: Remember that you want to optimize more than your
homepage. Unlike the last example which was a post, this is a page. Even though
nothing is sold on this page, the value of attracting top-notch talent is extremely
high.
Lesson Learned: Grant is the king of media hype. He understood that by
coming out strong that vaccinations are a personal choice, and should not be
required by any workplace, he got lots of media sources sending links. Links
boost rank, rank boosts visits, and visits boost results.
Page URL: 10xresource.com/seoswipe2
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 11 --

© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
Search Example #3 	Cardone Ventures Event Page
Content Details: This is a very simple page that provides event dates and info
for Cardone Ventures events. The page is created using a free WordPress event
plugin, making it easy to manage and better for SEO.
Overall Value: Because the events are formatted well, Google knows to read
the dates and displays them in search results. These are referred to as “rich
snippets”. This led to CV actually outranking the main site for events, naturally
leading to additional event sales.
Lesson Learned: When you have a function such as events, or virtually
anything, you can achieve better results by using a quality plugin. Always pay
attention to the effects of plugins both on your search results as well as your site
performance.
Page URL: 10xresource.com/seoswipe3
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 11 --

© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
Search Example #4 	GCTV.com Content Site
Content Details: This “sister site” is an additional web property created
specifically for content. Grant and his team publish multiple articles on the
WordPress site daily, often providing Grant’s commentary on current events. The
content is also published on 10X Daily, Grant’s daily email newsletter.
Overall Value: GCTV quickly created a massive amount of organic traffic,
generating millions of impressions and hundreds of thousands of clicks within
months. The site features pages for Grant’s most valuable offers and events, and
each new post strategically promotes a 10X product or service.
Lesson Learned: After building several content sites, the 10X team perfected
the model. In addition to free traffic and leads, the strategy for repurposing
content for web and email proved to be extremely valuable.
Page URL: 10xresource.com/seoswipe4
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 11 --

© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
Search Example #5 	Grant Cardone Shopify Store
Content Details: This is Grant’s eCommerce shop that sells everything including
books, clothing, tickets, courses, etc. The site was built on Shopify, which is
extremely easy to manage and performs extremely well on search engines.
Overall Value: Grant is huge on merch, which has helped GC and his 10X brand
spread far and wide. Having so many products, all of which are indexed by Google,
has given Grant millions of free impressions from searches.
Lesson Learned: While many people attempt to make a store within their main
site (using a tool such as Woocommerce for WordPress), the approach Grant took
proved more valuable. Using a subdomain at store.grantcardone.com created the
ability to link back and forth to his main site and other properties.
Page URL: 10xresource.com/seoswipe5
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 11 --

© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
Search Example #6 	Entrepreneur.com Author Profile
Content Details: Grant became a contributor to Entrepreneur many years ago.
As you can see, he submitted very consistently, having been published over 150
times.
Overall Value: This sort of “omnipresence” is what made Grant Cardone the
most well-known influencer in the world. In addition to free exposure, each article
has a link to one of Grant’s websites. These links from a high authority site like
entrepreneur.com are extremely valuable.
Lesson Learned: Consistency is the hardest part of content and SEO. Grant just
kept showing up year after year, and it paid off. Also notice that from his author
profile he chose to link to his YouTube, which he believes to be his most valuable
social media channel.
Page URL: 10xresource.com/seoswipe6
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 11 --

© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
Search Example #7 	Huffington Post Article By Grant
Content Details: This is an example of one of the many articles Grant has
contributed on high-ranking media websites. Notice how he starts with a strong
hook, then lays out a very well-organized body with easy-to-follow steps.
Overall Value: In addition to credibility, a post like this is extremely valuable
because of the backlink. Notice near the bottom of the article a link for Grant’s
book Sell or Be Sold. While he could have linked to Amazon, he links to his site to
get the search rank boost.
Lesson Learned: You don’t need to have millions of followers to contribute to
reputable websites. While you might not score Huff Post on day one, you can get
published on sites with great authority, and then work your way up from there.
Page URL: 10xresource.com/seoswipe7
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 11 --

Search Example #8 	Success Article About Grant
Content Details: As you’ll notice, this was actually a podcast hosted by Success
that was turned into a blog post. This is great for Grant because the time
commitment is minimal, and the value is multiplied.
Overall Value: This is just another example of Grant constantly self-promoting
in every way possible. One thing that Grant was surely clear on is the importance
of having a link to his most valuable website, Cardone Capital.
Lesson Learned: You will notice that Success uses many links in its articles, but
Grant made sure that his link was first. The higher the link on the page, the more
value it is given by Google.
Page URL: 10xresource.com/seoswipe8

© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
Search Example #9 	Cardone Foundation Press Release
Content Details: Grant is a major philanthropist, having donated over $10
million to charities. This is a press release that was posted online about his own
nonprofit, the Cardone Foundation. Grant supports underprivileged children all
around the world.
Overall Value: Grant’s companies have been pumping out press releases like
this consistently for many years. Press releases not only contain valuable
backlinks, but they lead to getting additional stories picked up by the press,
creating even more links.
Lesson Learned: If your company does something that is press worthy, put out
a press release every time. It won’t happen overnight, but the better you get at
presenting your story, the more you will get picked up by the media.
Page URL: 10xresource.com/seoswipe9
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 11 --

© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
Search Example #10 	Grant Cardone Linkedin Page
Content Details: Of all the social media platforms, Linkedin was one of the last
ones to get Grant’s attention. After recognizing the value of Linkedin, a network
full of business professionals, Grant and the 10X team have quickly reached over a
half million followers.
Overall Value: One of the most significant things about Linkedin is that it
ranks extremely well for both individual names and company names. In addition
to the standard links allowed on a Linkedin profile, you’ll notice Grant says “text
me at (305) 574-9093”. This builds Grant’s text community, which is extremely
valuable.
Lesson Learned: Social media is rarely thought about for its SEO value. Keep in
mind that people will usually Google your company before they buy from you.
Make sure that the first page is filled with your social media, instead of what you
don’t want people to see.
Page URL: 10xresource.com/seoswipe10
